markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on Q1 strategy and coordinate holiday schedules.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Flosum will shift messaging to proactively "disqualify" competitors by highlighting its superior security, a response to aggressive ABM from Gearset.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**PPC Performance:** A new PPC bidding strategy by agency Outshine is driving massive Top-of-Funnel (TOFU) growth, with ad impressions surging from 70k to nearly 4M in December.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [**Cross-Agency Sync:** A meeting will be scheduled for early January with Flosum, GrowthX, and Outshine to align messaging and keywords across all channels.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:** The week of Dec 29 is a team-wide quiet week with no new content or meetings. GrowthX will deliver all content for the next two weeks by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Messaging & Keyword Focus

  - [**New Messaging Goal:** "Disqualify" competitors by highlighting Flosum's superior security, making their offerings seem irrelevant.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A response to competitor Gearset's aggressive 1-to-1 ABM targeting Flosum customers with negative messaging (e.g., "Are you tired of being slowed down by Flosum?").](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [**Keyword Research Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
      - [Enterprise-focused terms.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Question-based queries to capture specific search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
      - [Terms that highlight security as a key differentiator.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [**Strategic Messaging Project:** The project is on hold to ensure the final message is perfectly landed and achieves the "disqualifying" goal.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### PPC Performance & Lead Tracking

  - [**PPC Agency:** Outshine.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [**Performance:** A new bidding strategy is driving significant TOFU growth.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Ad Impressions:** 70k → \~4M in December.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Leads:** The increased impressions are converting into leads.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [**Lead Tracking Issue:** Some new leads are arriving with "null" values for lead sourcing.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
      - [**Status:** Beau is investigating and updating triggers today.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

### Q1 Planning & Holiday Logistics

  - [**Q1 Planning:** The Q1 planning document from GrowthX will be reviewed in early January.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [**Holiday Content Delivery:** GrowthX will deliver all content for the weeks of Dec 16 and Dec 23 by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [**Quiet Week:** The week of Dec 29 is a team-wide quiet week with no new content or meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [**Resource Follow-ups:**](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [**Flosum:** Send requested resources to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [**Sydney:** Review topics marked "on hold" in the content tracker.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:** Schedule a cross-agency sync (Flosum, GrowthX, Outshine) for early January to align on messaging and keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [**Matt:** Share requested resources with GrowthX via the Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [**Beau:** Investigate and fix the "null" lead sourcing issue.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [**Sydney:** Review topics marked "on hold" in the content tracker.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Deliver all content for the weeks of Dec 16 and Dec 23 by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/tRwrAcHfSfsHS_SuhpSYatxVHqE2x4TC?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
